records.m_Talk_ENG: I am the wandering knight who shields the weak and upholds justice!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Whoa...! Took down an Anti-Corruption Category 4 Weapon all on your own...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Whoa...! Took down an Anti-Corruption Category 4 Weapon all on your own...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Whoa...! Took down an Anti-Corruption Category 4 Weapon all on your own...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Impressive. No wonder Teach picked you as a <color=#ffd34c>Special Operations Asset</color>.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Impressive. No wonder Teach picked you as a <color=#ffd34c>Special Operations Asset</color>.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Impressive. No wonder Teach picked you as a <color=#ffd34c>Special Operations Asset</color>.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But that mask... maybe...
records.m_Talk_DEU: But that mask... maybe...
records.m_Talk_FRA: But that mask... maybe...

records.m_Talk_ENG: *Huff* *Huff* *Huff...!*
records.m_Talk_DEU: *Huff* *Huff* *Huff...!*
records.m_Talk_FRA: *Huff* *Huff* *Huff...!*

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hey, you all right? You look winded.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hey, you all right? You look winded.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hey, you all right? You look winded.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ah, I'm fine. Just a little exhausted after using Aurafication.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ah, I'm fine. Just a little exhausted after using Aurafication.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ah, I'm fine. Just a little exhausted after using Aurafication.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I guess I still need more training.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I guess I still need more training.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I guess I still need more training.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Mm, if it can boost your Counter ability that much, it's definitely no ordinary mask.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Mm, if it can boost your Counter ability that much, it's definitely no ordinary mask.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Mm, if it can boost your Counter ability that much, it's definitely no ordinary mask.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Robin? Mind if I take a closer look at that mask?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Robin? Mind if I take a closer look at that mask?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Robin? Mind if I take a closer look at that mask?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh? You mean Ms. Aura?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh? You mean Ms. Aura?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh? You mean Ms. Aura?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hey, I'm a treasure hunter too. Appraising Artifacts is basic stuff!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hey, I'm a treasure hunter too. Appraising Artifacts is basic stuff!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hey, I'm a treasure hunter too. Appraising Artifacts is basic stuff!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I mean, I guess that's fine, but...
records.m_Talk_DEU: I mean, I guess that's fine, but...
records.m_Talk_FRA: I mean, I guess that's fine, but...

records.m_Talk_ENG: He he he he...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: He he he he...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: He he he he...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: M-Ms. Mi Rinae?
records.m_Talk_DEU: M-Ms. Mi Rinae?
records.m_Talk_FRA: M-Ms. Mi Rinae?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Robin, if there's one thing life's taught me...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Robin, if there's one thing life's taught me...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Robin, if there's one thing life's taught me...

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's that the more schemes humans plot, the easier they crumble to unforeseen events.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's that the more schemes humans plot, the easier they crumble to unforeseen events.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's that the more schemes humans plot, the easier they crumble to unforeseen events.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So what's the answer? You've got to go beyond being human!
records.m_Talk_DEU: So what's the answer? You've got to go beyond being human!
records.m_Talk_FRA: So what's the answer? You've got to go beyond being human!

records.m_Talk_ENG: What are you talking about, Ms. Mi Rinae?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What are you talking about, Ms. Mi Rinae?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What are you talking about, Ms. Mi Rinae?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I renounce my humanity, Robin!! I will transcend mankind!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I renounce my humanity, Robin!! I will transcend mankind!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I renounce my humanity, Robin!! I will transcend mankind!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: W-wait, Ms. Mi Rinae...! You're putting on Ms. Aura...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: W-wait, Ms. Mi Rinae...! You're putting on Ms. Aura...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: W-wait, Ms. Mi Rinae...! You're putting on Ms. Aura...?

records.m_Talk_ENG:
UWAAAAAAAHHHH 8
8 8
8 8
8 8
8!!
records.m_Talk_DEU:
UWAAAAAAAHHHH 8
8 8
8 8
8 8
8!!
records.m_Talk_FRA:
UWAAAAAAAHHHH 8
8 8
8 8
8 8
8!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ahh, I'm sorry! Ms. Mi Rinae!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ahh, I'm sorry! Ms. Mi Rinae!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ahh, I'm sorry! Ms. Mi Rinae!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ms. Aura doesn't like anyone but me wearing her...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ms. Aura doesn't like anyone but me wearing her...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ms. Aura doesn't like anyone but me wearing her...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: C'mon! You could've told me that a little sooner...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: C'mon! You could've told me that a little sooner...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: C'mon! You could've told me that a little sooner...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: All right, let's get moving.
records.m_Talk_DEU: All right, let's get moving.
records.m_Talk_FRA: All right, let's get moving.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The island's not that big, but if we want to find old man Khan, we'd better hurry...
records.m_Talk_DEU: The island's not that big, but if we want to find old man Khan, we'd better hurry...
records.m_Talk_FRA: The island's not that big, but if we want to find old man Khan, we'd better hurry...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hm?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hm?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hm?

records.m_Talk_ENG: "I know the fastest way to find Grandfather."
records.m_Talk_DEU: "I know the fastest way to find Grandfather."
records.m_Talk_FRA: "I know the fastest way to find Grandfather."

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...is what Lady Sita says offering a suggestion.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...is what Lady Sita says offering a suggestion.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...is what Lady Sita says offering a suggestion.

records.m_Talk_ENG: A suggestion, huh?
records.m_Talk_DEU: A suggestion, huh?
records.m_Talk_FRA: A suggestion, huh?

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Grandfather...
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Grandfather...
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Grandfather...

records.m_Talk_ENG: "Grandfather spent his entire life seeking the legacy of the Golden Vale."
records.m_Talk_DEU: "Grandfather spent his entire life seeking the legacy of the Golden Vale."
records.m_Talk_FRA: "Grandfather spent his entire life seeking the legacy of the Golden Vale."

records.m_Talk_ENG: "And recently, he nearly confirmed its location by piecing together the clues."
records.m_Talk_DEU: "And recently, he nearly confirmed its location by piecing together the clues."
records.m_Talk_FRA: "And recently, he nearly confirmed its location by piecing together the clues."

records.m_Talk_ENG: "That place is here. The Dawnbreak Floating Island."
records.m_Talk_DEU: "That place is here. The Dawnbreak Floating Island."
records.m_Talk_FRA: "That place is here. The Dawnbreak Floating Island."

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...is what Lady Sita says with conviction.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...is what Lady Sita says with conviction.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...is what Lady Sita says with conviction.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So if we follow those clues, we'll be able to track the old man down?
records.m_Talk_DEU: So if we follow those clues, we'll be able to track the old man down?
records.m_Talk_FRA: So if we follow those clues, we'll be able to track the old man down?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I also...
records.m_Talk_DEU: I also...
records.m_Talk_FRA: I also...

records.m_Talk_ENG: "I also studied <color=#ffd34c>Counterside Archaeology</color> to aid Grandfather."
records.m_Talk_DEU: "I also studied <color=#ffd34c>Counterside Archaeology</color> to aid Grandfather."
records.m_Talk_FRA: "I also studied <color=#ffd34c>Counterside Archaeology</color> to aid Grandfather."

records.m_Talk_ENG: "And I know every legend and clue about the Golden Vale."
records.m_Talk_DEU: "And I know every legend and clue about the Golden Vale."
records.m_Talk_FRA: "And I know every legend and clue about the Golden Vale."

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...is what Lady Sita says boasting with pride.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...is what Lady Sita says boasting with pride.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...is what Lady Sita says boasting with pride.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Hmph!
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Hmph!
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Hmph!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ah, sorry. That "boasting" part was my mistake. Allow me to rephrase.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ah, sorry. That "boasting" part was my mistake. Allow me to rephrase.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ah, sorry. That "boasting" part was my mistake. Allow me to rephrase.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hold on. Counterside Archaeology?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hold on. Counterside Archaeology?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hold on. Counterside Archaeology?

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's the study of ruins and relics left in the Counterside, to guess at their civilizations.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's the study of ruins and relics left in the Counterside, to guess at their civilizations.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's the study of ruins and relics left in the Counterside, to guess at their civilizations.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If you know where an Artifact came from, you can analyze the technology or mysteries within it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If you know where an Artifact came from, you can analyze the technology or mysteries within it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If you know where an Artifact came from, you can analyze the technology or mysteries within it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But the Golden Vale's legend...
records.m_Talk_DEU: But the Golden Vale's legend...
records.m_Talk_FRA: But the Golden Vale's legend...

records.m_Talk_ENG: When the radiant sun...
records.m_Talk_DEU: When the radiant sun...
records.m_Talk_FRA: When the radiant sun...

records.m_Talk_ENG: "When the radiant sun is veiled by roots, its light fading away..."
records.m_Talk_DEU: "When the radiant sun is veiled by roots, its light fading away..."
records.m_Talk_FRA: "When the radiant sun is veiled by roots, its light fading away..."

records.m_Talk_ENG: "The heavens will split open, and where earth and cloud meet, a golden city will appear."
records.m_Talk_DEU: "The heavens will split open, and where earth and cloud meet, a golden city will appear."
records.m_Talk_FRA: "The heavens will split open, and where earth and cloud meet, a golden city will appear."

records.m_Talk_ENG: "There, the Golden Vale's Legacy will save countless lives."
records.m_Talk_DEU: "There, the Golden Vale's Legacy will save countless lives."
records.m_Talk_FRA: "There, the Golden Vale's Legacy will save countless lives."

records.m_Talk_ENG: Grandfather said...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Grandfather said...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Grandfather said...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Grandfather said, to reach the Golden Vale...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Grandfather said, to reach the Golden Vale...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Grandfather said, to reach the Golden Vale...

records.m_Talk_ENG: "<color=#ffd34c>Artifacts of shared origin</color> are required."
records.m_Talk_DEU: "<color=#ffd34c>Artifacts of shared origin</color> are required."
records.m_Talk_FRA: "<color=#ffd34c>Artifacts of shared origin</color> are required."

records.m_Talk_ENG: "So far, only three have been identified as from the same world..."
records.m_Talk_DEU: "So far, only three have been identified as from the same world..."
records.m_Talk_FRA: "So far, only three have been identified as from the same world..."

records.m_Talk_ENG: And you can say...
records.m_Talk_DEU: And you can say...
records.m_Talk_FRA: And you can say...

records.m_Talk_ENG: "And you can say that we already possess one of them."
records.m_Talk_DEU: "And you can say that we already possess one of them."
records.m_Talk_FRA: "And you can say that we already possess one of them."

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh? Already have one?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh? Already have one?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh? Already have one?

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's right.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's right.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's right.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The first is the <color=#ffd34c>eye of the Black Forest Guardian Spider</color>...
records.m_Talk_DEU: The first is the <color=#ffd34c>eye of the Black Forest Guardian Spider</color>...
records.m_Talk_FRA: The first is the <color=#ffd34c>eye of the Black Forest Guardian Spider</color>...

records.m_Talk_ENG: A spider's eye...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: A spider's eye...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: A spider's eye...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Aha, of course! The Moderator...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Aha, of course! The Moderator...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Aha, of course! The Moderator...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: It may have been built by the Old Administration, but its algorithms shift with the environment!
records.m_Talk_DEU: It may have been built by the Old Administration, but its algorithms shift with the environment!
records.m_Talk_FRA: It may have been built by the Old Administration, but its algorithms shift with the environment!

records.m_Talk_ENG: If it's been exposed long enough to a particular Counterside, its traits could change!
records.m_Talk_DEU: If it's been exposed long enough to a particular Counterside, its traits could change!
records.m_Talk_FRA: If it's been exposed long enough to a particular Counterside, its traits could change!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Still... isn't that kind of flimsy as proof?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Still... isn't that kind of flimsy as proof?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Still... isn't that kind of flimsy as proof?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Theoretically, Moderators can warp in anywhere, can't they?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Theoretically, Moderators can warp in anywhere, can't they?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Theoretically, Moderators can warp in anywhere, can't they?

records.m_Talk_ENG: In this region...
records.m_Talk_DEU: In this region...
records.m_Talk_FRA: In this region...

records.m_Talk_ENG: "In this region, the Moderators all have moss-covered frames."
records.m_Talk_DEU: "In this region, the Moderators all have moss-covered frames."
records.m_Talk_FRA: "In this region, the Moderators all have moss-covered frames."

records.m_Talk_ENG: Come to think of it...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Come to think of it...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Come to think of it...

records.m_Talk_ENG: This Moderator's chassis is covered in moss too.
records.m_Talk_DEU: This Moderator's chassis is covered in moss too.
records.m_Talk_FRA: This Moderator's chassis is covered in moss too.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yes. And that moss...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yes. And that moss...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yes. And that moss...

records.m_Talk_ENG: L-Lady Sita! What are you doing?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: L-Lady Sita! What are you doing?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: L-Lady Sita! What are you doing?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: In a high-level Corrupted Area, even a scratch can be deadly!
records.m_Talk_DEU: In a high-level Corrupted Area, even a scratch can be deadly!
records.m_Talk_FRA: In a high-level Corrupted Area, even a scratch can be deadly!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Seeing is believing... I wanted to show you...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Seeing is believing... I wanted to show you...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Seeing is believing... I wanted to show you...

records.m_Talk_ENG: The trait of Golden Vale moss... and how it turns golden...
records.m_Talk_DEU: The trait of Golden Vale moss... and how it turns golden...
records.m_Talk_FRA: The trait of Golden Vale moss... and how it turns golden...

records.m_Talk_ENG: When human blood... touches it...
records.m_Talk_DEU: When human blood... touches it...
records.m_Talk_FRA: When human blood... touches it...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ahh, I'm sorry! Ms. Mi Rinae!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ahh, I'm sorry! Ms. Mi Rinae!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ahh, I'm sorry! Ms. Mi Rinae!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ms. Aura doesn't like anyone but me wearing her...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ms. Aura doesn't like anyone but me wearing her...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ms. Aura doesn't like anyone but me wearing her...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: C'mon! You could've told me that a little sooner...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: C'mon! You could've told me that a little sooner...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: C'mon! You could've told me that a little sooner...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: All right, let's get moving.
root.m_Talk_DEU: All right, let's get moving.
root.m_Talk_FRA: All right, let's get moving.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The island's not that big, but if we want to find old man Khan, we'd better hurry...
root.m_Talk_DEU: The island's not that big, but if we want to find old man Khan, we'd better hurry...
root.m_Talk_FRA: The island's not that big, but if we want to find old man Khan, we'd better hurry...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hm?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hm?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hm?

root.m_Talk_ENG: "I know the fastest way to find Grandfather."
root.m_Talk_DEU: "I know the fastest way to find Grandfather."
root.m_Talk_FRA: "I know the fastest way to find Grandfather."

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...is what Lady Sita says offering a suggestion.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...is what Lady Sita says offering a suggestion.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...is what Lady Sita says offering a suggestion.

root.m_Talk_ENG: A suggestion, huh?
root.m_Talk_DEU: A suggestion, huh?
root.m_Talk_FRA: A suggestion, huh?

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Grandfather...
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Grandfather...
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Grandfather...

root.m_Talk_ENG: "Grandfather spent his entire life seeking the legacy of the Golden Vale."
root.m_Talk_DEU: "Grandfather spent his entire life seeking the legacy of the Golden Vale."
root.m_Talk_FRA: "Grandfather spent his entire life seeking the legacy of the Golden Vale."

root.m_Talk_ENG: "And recently, he nearly confirmed its location by piecing together the clues."
root.m_Talk_DEU: "And recently, he nearly confirmed its location by piecing together the clues."
root.m_Talk_FRA: "And recently, he nearly confirmed its location by piecing together the clues."

root.m_Talk_ENG: "That place is here. The Dawnbreak Floating Island."
root.m_Talk_DEU: "That place is here. The Dawnbreak Floating Island."
root.m_Talk_FRA: "That place is here. The Dawnbreak Floating Island."

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...is what Lady Sita says with conviction.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...is what Lady Sita says with conviction.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...is what Lady Sita says with conviction.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So if we follow those clues, we'll be able to track the old man down?
root.m_Talk_DEU: So if we follow those clues, we'll be able to track the old man down?
root.m_Talk_FRA: So if we follow those clues, we'll be able to track the old man down?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I also...
root.m_Talk_DEU: I also...
root.m_Talk_FRA: I also...

root.m_Talk_ENG: "I also studied <color=#ffd34c>Counterside Archaeology</color> to aid Grandfather."
root.m_Talk_DEU: "I also studied <color=#ffd34c>Counterside Archaeology</color> to aid Grandfather."
root.m_Talk_FRA: "I also studied <color=#ffd34c>Counterside Archaeology</color> to aid Grandfather."

root.m_Talk_ENG: "And I know every legend and clue about the Golden Vale."
root.m_Talk_DEU: "And I know every legend and clue about the Golden Vale."
root.m_Talk_FRA: "And I know every legend and clue about the Golden Vale."

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...is what Lady Sita says boasting with pride.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...is what Lady Sita says boasting with pride.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...is what Lady Sita says boasting with pride.

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Hmph!
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Hmph!
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Hmph!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ah, sorry. That "boasting" part was my mistake. Allow me to rephrase.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ah, sorry. That "boasting" part was my mistake. Allow me to rephrase.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ah, sorry. That "boasting" part was my mistake. Allow me to rephrase.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hold on. Counterside Archaeology?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hold on. Counterside Archaeology?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hold on. Counterside Archaeology?

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's the study of ruins and relics left in the Counterside, to guess at their civilizations.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's the study of ruins and relics left in the Counterside, to guess at their civilizations.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's the study of ruins and relics left in the Counterside, to guess at their civilizations.

root.m_Talk_ENG: If you know where an Artifact came from, you can analyze the technology or mysteries within it.
root.m_Talk_DEU: If you know where an Artifact came from, you can analyze the technology or mysteries within it.
root.m_Talk_FRA: If you know where an Artifact came from, you can analyze the technology or mysteries within it.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But the Golden Vale's legend...
root.m_Talk_DEU: But the Golden Vale's legend...
root.m_Talk_FRA: But the Golden Vale's legend...

root.m_Talk_ENG: When the radiant sun...
root.m_Talk_DEU: When the radiant sun...
root.m_Talk_FRA: When the radiant sun...

root.m_Talk_ENG: "When the radiant sun is veiled by roots, its light fading away..."
root.m_Talk_DEU: "When the radiant sun is veiled by roots, its light fading away..."
root.m_Talk_FRA: "When the radiant sun is veiled by roots, its light fading away..."

root.m_Talk_ENG: "The heavens will split open, and where earth and cloud meet, a golden city will appear."
root.m_Talk_DEU: "The heavens will split open, and where earth and cloud meet, a golden city will appear."
root.m_Talk_FRA: "The heavens will split open, and where earth and cloud meet, a golden city will appear."

root.m_Talk_ENG: "There, the Golden Vale's Legacy will save countless lives."
root.m_Talk_DEU: "There, the Golden Vale's Legacy will save countless lives."
root.m_Talk_FRA: "There, the Golden Vale's Legacy will save countless lives."

root.m_Talk_ENG: Grandfather said...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Grandfather said...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Grandfather said...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Grandfather said, to reach the Golden Vale...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Grandfather said, to reach the Golden Vale...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Grandfather said, to reach the Golden Vale...

root.m_Talk_ENG: "<color=#ffd34c>Artifacts of shared origin</color> are required."
root.m_Talk_DEU: "<color=#ffd34c>Artifacts of shared origin</color> are required."
root.m_Talk_FRA: "<color=#ffd34c>Artifacts of shared origin</color> are required."

root.m_Talk_ENG: "So far, only three have been identified as from the same world..."
root.m_Talk_DEU: "So far, only three have been identified as from the same world..."
root.m_Talk_FRA: "So far, only three have been identified as from the same world..."

root.m_Talk_ENG: And you can say...
root.m_Talk_DEU: And you can say...
root.m_Talk_FRA: And you can say...

root.m_Talk_ENG: "And you can say that we already possess one of them."
root.m_Talk_DEU: "And you can say that we already possess one of them."
root.m_Talk_FRA: "And you can say that we already possess one of them."

root.m_Talk_ENG: Huh? Already have one?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Huh? Already have one?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Huh? Already have one?

root.m_Talk_ENG: That's right.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That's right.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That's right.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The first is the <color=#ffd34c>eye of the Black Forest Guardian Spider</color>...
root.m_Talk_DEU: The first is the <color=#ffd34c>eye of the Black Forest Guardian Spider</color>...
root.m_Talk_FRA: The first is the <color=#ffd34c>eye of the Black Forest Guardian Spider</color>...

root.m_Talk_ENG: A spider's eye...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: A spider's eye...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: A spider's eye...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Aha, of course! The Moderator...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Aha, of course! The Moderator...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Aha, of course! The Moderator...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: It may have been built by the Old Administration, but its algorithms shift with the environment!
root.m_Talk_DEU: It may have been built by the Old Administration, but its algorithms shift with the environment!
root.m_Talk_FRA: It may have been built by the Old Administration, but its algorithms shift with the environment!

root.m_Talk_ENG: If it's been exposed long enough to a particular Counterside, its traits could change!
root.m_Talk_DEU: If it's been exposed long enough to a particular Counterside, its traits could change!
root.m_Talk_FRA: If it's been exposed long enough to a particular Counterside, its traits could change!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Still... isn't that kind of flimsy as proof?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Still... isn't that kind of flimsy as proof?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Still... isn't that kind of flimsy as proof?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Theoretically, Moderators can warp in anywhere, can't they?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Theoretically, Moderators can warp in anywhere, can't they?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Theoretically, Moderators can warp in anywhere, can't they?

root.m_Talk_ENG: In this region...
root.m_Talk_DEU: In this region...
root.m_Talk_FRA: In this region...

root.m_Talk_ENG: "In this region, the Moderators all have moss-covered frames."
root.m_Talk_DEU: "In this region, the Moderators all have moss-covered frames."
root.m_Talk_FRA: "In this region, the Moderators all have moss-covered frames."

root.m_Talk_ENG: Come to think of it...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Come to think of it...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Come to think of it...

root.m_Talk_ENG: This Moderator's chassis is covered in moss too.
root.m_Talk_DEU: This Moderator's chassis is covered in moss too.
root.m_Talk_FRA: This Moderator's chassis is covered in moss too.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yes. And that moss...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yes. And that moss...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yes. And that moss...

root.m_Talk_ENG: L-Lady Sita! What are you doing?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: L-Lady Sita! What are you doing?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: L-Lady Sita! What are you doing?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: In a high-level Corrupted Area, even a scratch can be deadly!
root.m_Talk_DEU: In a high-level Corrupted Area, even a scratch can be deadly!
root.m_Talk_FRA: In a high-level Corrupted Area, even a scratch can be deadly!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Seeing is believing... I wanted to show you...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Seeing is believing... I wanted to show you...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Seeing is believing... I wanted to show you...

root.m_Talk_ENG: The trait of Golden Vale moss... and how it turns golden...
root.m_Talk_DEU: The trait of Golden Vale moss... and how it turns golden...
root.m_Talk_FRA: The trait of Golden Vale moss... and how it turns golden...

root.m_Talk_ENG: When human blood... touches it...
root.m_Talk_DEU: When human blood... touches it...
root.m_Talk_FRA: When human blood... touches it...
